title: A New Approach of Finding Squares
author: Sushankar Da
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: In this paper, we discuss about a new approach of finding square firstly in Arithmetic form and thereafter write the method (formula) in Algebraic form. The new method is mainly based on two steps, namely steps 1 and steps 2. After adding this step we find the result. This method may be named as two steps method of finding square or squaring of any digit numbers.
steps_raw: In this paper, we discuss about a new approach of finding square firstly in Arithmetic form and thereafter write the method (formula) in Algebraic form. The new method is mainly based on two steps, namely steps 1 and steps 2. After adding this step we find the result. This method may be named as two steps method of finding square or squaring of any digit numbers.
keywords: Two steps method of squaring. Vertical or direct multiplication, Horizontal multiplication, Doubling the partial product using block, omitting block.
